title: Boosted PVP
description: This Mod Pack Is Made For The Best Performance And PVP Experience Possible
body:
TideFear’s PVP Mods 1.0.0 is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed to give players a competitive edge in PvP. Built for smooth gameplay and fast response times, this pack combines essential client-side optimization mods with helpful PvP utilities that improve visibility, tracking, and overall combat performance.

The modpack includes powerful performance enhancers such as Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast to dramatically boost FPS and reduce lag, ensuring stable gameplay even during intense fights. Visual optimization mods like Entity Culling and MoreCulling help remove unnecessary rendering, keeping your screen clean and your game running smoothly.

For PvP improvements, the pack features tools that enhance combat awareness and control. Hitbox visualization, CPS tracking, and improved hit detection help players better understand their timing and accuracy during fights. Quality-of-life mods such as AppleSkin provide useful information about hunger and saturation, helping you manage resources more effectively during battles.

This modpack is designed to stay lightweight and client-side friendly, meaning it works on most multiplayer servers without requiring server installation. The goal is simple: maximize performance, clarity, and combat awareness without adding unnecessary features.

Whether you're grinding PvP servers, practicing your aim, or just want a smoother Minecraft experience, TideFear’s PVP Mods delivers the tools you need to fight faster, see clearer, and play better.
